title: UX Cleanup for Filters and General Usability
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a cleaner and more intuitive filter experience, so that I can navigate and use the application more efficiently.
description: General UX improvement pass focused on cleaning up the user experience around filters and overall usability. Scope documented in a linked Confluence page covering filter behavior, layout cleanup, and interaction refinements.
acceptance_criteria: Filter controls are visually cleaned up and consistent
User experience improvements are applied as documented in the linked Confluence page
ux_changes: General cleanup of filter controls and user interface elements to improve usability and visual consistency.
implementation_notes: Detailed requirements were maintained in a Confluence page. Work was completed and submitted for review.
comment_summary: Developer completed the work and submitted for review.
